Cookies.text: We use cookies to measure and improve your experience.
Cookies.necessaryCookiesDescription: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They enable basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website.
Cookies.analyticsCookiesDescription: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. They help us improve our website and services.
Cookies.marketingCookiesDescription: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites. They are set to display targeted advertisements that are relevant and engaging for individual users.
Cookies.preferenceCookiesDescription: These cookies enable the website to remember choices you make (such as your username, language, or the region you are in) and provide enhanced, more personal features.
Cookies.howToManageDescription: You can set your browser to refuse all or some browser cookies, or to alert you when websites set or access cookies. If you disable or refuse cookies, please note that some parts of this website may not function properly.

Main.instructions: Enter a company name, a service category such as “hairdresser” or “shop”, or a location such as “Warsaw” or “Krakow” to find Eastern businesses in Poland. You can also leave the field empty to browse all companies.
Main.searchInstructions: Open the map with Eastern businesses in Poland. If you entered a search, the results will be filtered.
Main.goToContact: Add your Eastern business to the directory. Go to the contact form to submit your company.

Faq.navigate: Use the up/down arrows to navigate between questions, press Enter or Space to expand/collapse an answer, and use Home/End to jump to the beginning/end of the list.
Faq.title: F.A.Q. – Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions.
Faq.subtitleContact: Write to us, we'll be happy to help.
Faq.search: Search by category, name or location
Faq.answer1: Polvia is a modern business directory connecting Ukrainian entrepreneurs in Poland with customers. We bring together shops and specialists offering services in both Ukrainian and Polish languages.
Faq.answer2: For Ukrainians looking for services in their native language, for Poles who appreciate Eastern European products, and for businesses (PL & UA) looking to effectively acquire new customers.
Faq.question3: How is Polvia different from Google Maps or Facebook groups?
Faq.answer3: Google Maps doesn't filter businesses by service language, and FB groups are often chaotic and full of spam. Polvia is an organized directory where every business has a clear listing without the noise.
Faq.question4: Why should I add my business to the Polvia directory?
Faq.answer4: You gain better SEO ranking and visibility on Google. Your brand reaches people actively searching for specific services, leading to real inquiries and sales.
Faq.question5: How can I add my company?
Faq.answer5: Click 'Add Business' or 'Promote Business', fill out a short form, and our team will publish your listing within 24 hours.
Faq.question6: Do I need to have a registered business in Poland?
Faq.answer6: We do not require any documents. The most important thing is that you actually provide services in Poland and provide reliable contact details for customers.
Faq.question7: Why is the site in Polish if it's an 'Eastern' directory?
Faq.answer7: The Polish version opens your business to the local market. Poles love Ukrainian cuisine and craftsmanship – don't limit yourself to just one audience!
Faq.question8: How much does it cost, and why so expensive?
Faq.answer8: Listing your business is currently free. Paid promotion options will be available in the future, but basic directory browsing will always remain free.
Faq.question9: How can I make my business stand out from the competition?
Faq.answer9: We offer paid listing highlights, sponsored articles, and promotion on our social media. Contact us if you want to be at the very top.
Faq.question10: I don't have a website or social media profile. Can I still join?
Faq.answer10: Of course! A Polvia listing can serve as your main web page. We also help with creating professional websites and managing social media profiles.
Faq.question11: My business information is outdated. What should I do?
Faq.answer11: Let us know via the contact form. We will verify your identity and update the details (photos, description, phone) as quickly as possible.
Faq.question12: How do you protect my personal data (GDPR)?
Faq.answer12: We only store what is necessary for your business presentation. Our servers are in the EU, and you have the right to edit or delete your data at any time.
Faq.question13: Can I write a blog post for Polvia?
Faq.answer13: Yes! We'd love to publish interesting success stories, industry tips, or community news. It's a great way to build your status as an expert.
Faq.question: question
Faq.goToContact: Visit the contact page to ask a question or register your company.
Faq.summaryFaq2: the most frequently asked questions about the service
Faq.summaryFaq3: The questions concern adding companies, costs, features, and data protection. If you do not find an answer to your question, please use the contact form.
